subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! By God, verily the inmates of heaven praise those who are firm
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من ثبت علی المیثاق لعمر الله ان سکان ملکوت الوجود یصلون علی الذین ثبتوا
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
